name: J Escom Holdings,Inc.
summary: J Escom Holdings,Inc., through its subsidiaries, engages in the sale of products related to beauty and beauty consumables in Japan. The company operates through Beauty and Beauty; Education Consulting; Publishing-Related; and Mail Order segments. It provides consulting services for companies; TV and Internet mail orders services, as well as publishes magazine under the Soup name. The company was formerly known as ESCOM Co., Ltd. and changed its name to J Escom Holdings,Inc. in 2005. J Escom Holdings,Inc. was founded in 1968 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
